title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Workshop - Effortless DeFi: Extending the EIL SDK
description:
* 🔇 Apologies for the audio issues in the first minute *

This workshop by Ofir Eliasi (Stitch) and Ivo Georgiev (Ambire, CEO), goes over the new EIL SDK and how it provides easy building blocks that allow advanced flows and user-centric DeFi.

Workshop given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
